items.name: Paul's Signature J.D. Burger
items.description: 6oz steak patty, streaky bacon, chilli cheese, homemade onion rings, lettuce and tomato. With Paul's secret recipe maple bourbon Jack Daniel's BBQ sauce. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Texas Burger
items.description: 6oz steak patty, fried egg, homemade onion rings and HP sauce. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Nacho Cheeseburger
items.description: 6oz steak patty, crunchy nachos, jalapenos and warm nacho cheese sauce. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Camembert Burger
items.description: 6oz steak patty, melted Camembert, lettuce and beef tomato. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Garlic Mushroom & Blue Cheese Burger
items.description: 6oz steak patty, garlic mushroom and melted blue cheese. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Chilli Burger
items.description: 6oz steak patty topped with homemade chilli, chilli cheese and sour cream. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Surf & Turf Burger
items.description: 6oz steak patty, freshly battered fish fillet and tartare sauce. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Chicken & Bacon Burger
items.description: Two crispy chicken fillets, bacon and melted cheese. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Spicy Buffalo Chicken Burger
items.description: Two crispy chicken fillets, spicy cheese and buffalo sauce. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Southern Fried Chicken Burger
items.description: Crispy southern fried chicken fillets with lettuce and mayo. Served with skinny fries and house slaw.

items.name: Doner Kebab
items.description: Freshly prepared doner meat served in warm flatbread with fresh salad and fries.

items.name: Chicken Shish Kebab
items.description: Seasoned chicken with peppers served in warm flatbread with pickled red cabbage, fresh salad and fries.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken Kebab
items.description: Marinated tandoori chicken served in warm flatbread with fresh salad and fries.

items.name: Chicken & Bacon Loaded Fries
items.description: Chicken and bacon pieces cooked in a BBQ sauce, tossed over fries and topped with melted cheese.

items.name: Philly Cheesesteak Loaded Fries
items.description: Sliced steak, onions, and peppers lightly seasoned, spread over seasoned fries and topped with melted Monterey Jack cheese.

items.name: Salt, Chilli & Pepper Loaded Fries
items.description: Choice of beef, pork or chicken strips with onions and peppers, spread over seasoned fries.

items.name: Meatball Marinara Loaded Fries
items.description: Homemade beef meatballs in a tomato and herb sauce over fries with mozzarella cheese.
